summary: Completed testing of MealsCards Vite+React+TypeScript+Supabase app. All core functionality tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Application loads correctly on preview URL (https://91ae572f-b20c-4583-b87c-f2bd8cc68fae.preview.emergentagent.com)
PIN lock screen appears and is functional with proper UI elements
TypeScript compilation passes without errors (npx tsc --noEmit)
Vite dev server runs correctly on port 3000
All imports resolve correctly - fixed circular dependency between AIChefSuggestions.tsx and FoodItems.tsx
React app root element renders content successfully
Environment variables are properly configured for Supabase integration
HTML structure and meta tags are correct
